cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Namaste Bimla Devi ji. How are you today?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, I'm fine, thank you. Who is this?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: My name is Rohan, and I'm calling from the Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme. We've been trying to reach you regarding your scheme card.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, okay. What about my card?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: It's ready for collection, Bimla Devi ji. You can pick it up from your nearest designated center. Would you like me to give you the address?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, please. I've been waiting for this card.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Of course, ji. The address is... (provides address). You can collect it anytime between 10 am and 5 pm.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 45s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An agent from a government insurance scheme like [GOVERNMENT_SCHEME] calls a beneficiary to inform them that their scheme card is ready for collection at their nearest designated center.
